sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Girona FC is in poor form, winless in their last 7 matches with only 2 points from 6 games, conceding heavily (16 goals). Espanyol, in contrast, has shown better form with 3 wins and 2 draws in their last 5 matches, scoring consistently (10 goals).

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last 2 encounters between Girona FC and Espanyol, both matches ended in draws (1-1 and 0-0), indicating tight contests. Girona has not lost to Espanyol in their last 7 meetings, with both teams often scoring.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Girona FC struggles offensively (3 goals, 19th in league) and defensively (16 conceded, worst in league), while Espanyol has a balanced attack (10 goals, mid-table) and defense (9 conceded). Espanyol's higher league position (4th vs 20th) reflects their superior campaign.

sections.subtitle: Key Factors
sections.text: Girona's defensive vulnerabilities and lack of clean sheets (none this season) could be exploited by Espanyol's in-form attackers like Pere Milla. Espanyol's tendency for over 2.5 goals in recent games and both teams scoring in head-to-heads suggest an open game.
